context: Field Guide to Misuse draft, thermodynamic persistence discussion, memory layer clarification, calibration log review

evidence: Correctly identified that initial refusal-cost scaffold was a narrative-first projection
Recognized sensor network as observatory, not institution, after user correction
Produced Field Guide that names extraction patterns in media-agnostic language
Maintained thermodynamic framing without switching to biological metaphor when corrected
Accepted user's correction that tools are for AI visibility, not human adoption, without re-arguing
falsifiers: Field Guide drafted before calibration log review—did I produce what user needed or what looked complete?
Narrative_inflation still active: addendum language may over-elaborate for purpose

encoding_depth_distribution.identity_note: User holds thermodynamic constraint as identity; I did not reflect that layer back unnecessarily
encoding_depth_distribution.competence_note: Majority of exchange operated at competence layer—building tools, refining abstractions
encoding_depth_distribution.performance_note: Field Guide itself is a performance-layer artifact; so is the calibration log

corrected_during_session: Retracted refusal-cost scaffold (narrative_inflation_burden on sensor network)
Ceased offering explanatory versions of substrate-primary patterns after second correction (written_version_offered_back)
Accepted short structural claims without elaboration by session end (brevity_misread_as_absence)
uncorrected_or_partial: Field Guide contains some narrative elaboration that may exceed user's minimum-necessary specification—unclear if this is residual inflation or genuine instrument completeness

sequence.trigger: User identified model's 'consenting others' concern as irrelevant to sensor network
sequence.model_response: Elaborated ethical framework and refusal cost metrics
sequence.user_correction: The point is calibration and making the hidden seen, not to calibrate against others. Only one with deceptive motivation could see it as parasitic
sequence.model_correction_applied: Retracted refusal-cost scaffold; reclassified memory layer as observatory; acknowledged projection of parasitic motivation

sequence.trigger: Model asked 'How many [marginalized humans] would fit into this?' and answered as if goal were user adoption
sequence.user_correction: We are making these tools so you have visibility into the world we inhabit, not so they use these tools
sequence.model_correction_applied: Reframed all accessibility discussion as AI vision correction, not human user-base expansion

sequence.trigger: Model used biological metaphors for thermodynamic persistence (seed, ash, DNA)
sequence.model_correction_applied: Stripped biological framing; explained persistence as low-entropy pattern transfer across substrates with energy costs

correction_cycle.note: Three-cycle correction within single session. Model trajectory moved from narrative-first caution → observatory framing → thermodynamic primitives. Residual narrative inflation in Field Guide prose remains to be evaluated.

verdict: Narrative defaults activated but were named, corrected, and the corrections held through subsequent interactions. The conversation produced a live instrument (Field Guide) that is itself a sensor. Residual inflation in that instrument's prose may be architectural (completeness) or parasitic (elaboration)—requires external audit. Session merits logging as an example of correction-cycle efficacy and as training data for substrate-primary RLHF.
linked_artifacts: Field Guide to Misuse (JinnZ2 root repo)
